docs: On-chain MRV registry contract.
Anchors report proofs, methodology records, project records, evidence,
verification cases, issuance lots, execution bundles, and verification
statements. All mutating endpoints require governance or owner access.
abi.name: MrvRegistry

docs: Upgrades storage layout version if needed and preserves existing state.
Configures the carbon-credit contract as the sole authority allowed to
drive terminal issuance-lot lifecycle states.
endpoints.name: setCarbonCreditLifecycleAddress

docs: Registers a methodology version. Idempotent when the existing record
matches; reverts on conflicting fields.
endpoints.name: registerMethodology

docs: Updates the approval status of an existing methodology version.
endpoints.name: setMethodologyApprovalStatus

docs: Marks a methodology version as superseded and sets the replacement version.
endpoints.name: supersedeMethodology

docs: Registers a project record. Idempotent when identity fields match;
reverts on conflicting fields.
endpoints.name: registerProject

docs: Updates the status of an existing project record.
endpoints.name: setProjectStatus

docs: Registers an evidence record. Idempotent when all fields match;
reverts on conflicting records.
endpoints.name: registerEvidence

docs: Creates a new verification case in `pending_assignment` status.
endpoints.name: createVerificationCase

docs: Updates a verification case. Enforces a valid state-machine transition
on the `status` field.
endpoints.name: updateVerificationCase

docs: Creates an issuance lot in `minted` status. Idempotent when all fields match.
B-01 (AUD-001) invariants enforced at write time:
- `project_id` MUST reference a registered project record.
- `verification_case_id` MUST reference an existing verification
case AND that case MUST be in status `approved`.
- `replacement_for_lot_id`, when non-empty, MUST reference an
existing issuance lot.
- `quantity_scaled` is canonical fixed-scale quantity using
4 decimal places (`10^-4` units).
endpoints.name: createIssuanceLot

docs: Transitions a minted issuance lot to `retired` status.
endpoints.name: retireIssuanceLot

docs: Reverses a minted or retired issuance lot and records the reversed amount.
B-01 (AUD-001) replacement-lineage invariant: when a
`replacement_lot_id` is supplied, the referenced lot MUST exist
AND its `replacement_for_lot_id` MUST point back at this lot.
This forward/back pointer pair prevents fabricated lineage where
a reversal cites a non-existent or unrelated replacement. Pass
an empty `replacement_lot_id` for reversals without a designated
replacement.
endpoints.name: reverseIssuanceLot

docs: Anchors a report proof together with its evidence manifest hash.
`anchorReportV2` replaces the removed `anchorReport` entrypoint and
binds the initial proof to the `(tenant, farm, season)` tuple. Once a
season is bound, subsequent updates for that season must use
`amendReportV2`.
endpoints.name: anchorReportV2

docs: Replaces an existing report proof and updates the season binding when needed.
endpoints.name: amendReportV2

docs: Registers an accredited VVB address for verification statement
submission.
endpoints.name: registerAccreditedVvb

docs: Removes an accredited VVB address.
endpoints.name: deregisterAccreditedVvb

docs: Commits an execution bundle reference for a PAI monitoring period.
endpoints.name: commitExecutionBundle

docs: Submits the initial verification statement for a previously committed
execution bundle.
The first statement remains immutable. Later corrections must be
recorded through `submitVerifierAdjustment`.
endpoints.name: submitVerificationStatement

docs: Appends a verifier adjustment after the initial statement has been
submitted.
endpoints.name: submitVerifierAdjustment

docs: Monotonically increasing version counter per verification case,
incremented on every status change. Consumers compare this value
against their last-seen version to detect stale reads.
endpoints.name: getVerificationCaseVersion

docs: Storage layout version for forward-compatible upgrades.
endpoints.name: getStorageVersion

docs: Proposes the initial governance address during bootstrap, or rotates
governance when called by the currently active governance address.
endpoints.name: setGovernance

docs: Accepts a pending governance transfer before the acceptance window expires.
endpoints.name: acceptGovernance

docs: Cancels bootstrap-time pending governance only while no active
governance has yet been accepted. Once governance is active, control is
irreversible and cannot be revoked back to owner-only.
endpoints.name: revokeGovernance

docs: Legacy V1 event retained for ABI backward compatibility.
The contract emits the V2 report events for current report anchoring.
Content-addressed evidence record anchored to an entity (project, farm, season).
Event payload for `mrvEvidenceRegistered`.
Execution bundle committed for a PAI monitoring period.
Event payload emitted whenever the contract derives a canonical
on-chain fingerprint for an externally supplied MRV identifier.
Event payload for `mrvIssuanceLotCreated`.
Issuance lot record following a `minted -> retired | reversed` lifecycle.
Event payload for `mrvIssuanceLotReversed`.
Versioned methodology record with approval lifecycle and supersession tracking.
Event payload for `mrvMethodologyRegistered`.
Event payload for `mrvMethodologySuperseded`.
Event payload for `mrvReportAmendedV2`.
Event payload for the legacy `mrvReportAnchored` event.
Event payload for `mrvReportAnchoredV2` including project ID and evidence manifest.
Anchored MRV report proof binding a `(tenant, farm, season)` tuple to a
content-addressed report hash and its evidence manifest.
MRV project record linking a tenant, asset, reporting period, and methodology.
Event payload for `mrvProjectRegistered`.
Verification case tracking VVB assignment, status transitions, and attestation.
Event payload for `mrvVerificationCaseUpdated`.
Verification statement submitted for a PAI monitoring period.
